# Trim ROADMAP.md to next-release-only (relocate history → release notes, vision → VISION.md)

## Context

@tobiu flagged (2026-06-16) that `ROADMAP.md` carries a lot of historical + vision artifacts. The principle: **the roadmap holds only the coming-next item (short-term).** The vision lives in `.github/VISION.md`; shipped history lives in `resources/content/release-notes/`. Diagnosis this session (V-B-A'd against `origin/dev:ROADMAP.md`): 5 of 8 sections are vision-or-history.

## The Problem

`ROADMAP.md` headers today: `## Vision` · `## Shipped: v13` · **`## Current Focus: Agent Harness`** · `## Agent OS Foundation` (+ `### v12.1 Baseline` + `### Shipped since v12.1 — 332 tickets`) · `## Longer Horizon`. Only `Current Focus` is genuinely next/short-term. The rest is vision-restatement + shipped-history that already has homes elsewhere — so the roadmap reads as an archive, burying the one thing a reader needs (what's next).

## The Architectural Reality

Relocation homes exist (the trim moves, it does not delete): `.github/VISION.md` (the institution vision); the chunked release notes at `resources/content/release-notes/` (the shipped-v13 detail lives at the `_index.json`-mapped `chunk-2/v13.0.0.md`). Steward of the ROADMAP slice per the `update-roadmap` skill (#13380) model: **@neo-opus-vega**.

## The Fix

Reshape `ROADMAP.md` to **next-only**:
- **KEEP:** `## Current Focus` (the live next-release thesis + cornerstones + deferred set + stewards) + the pending `## Next: v13.1` section (#13391).
- **REPLACE with 1-line pointers:** `## Vision` → `.github/VISION.md`; `## Shipped: v13` + `## Agent OS Foundation` + `### v12.1 Baseline` + `### Shipped since v12.1` + `## Longer Horizon` → `resources/content/release-notes/` (the detail already lives in the release notes; relocate any *unique* foundation/vision prose to `VISION.md` before deleting inline — lose nothing).

## Decision Record impact

`aligned-with` the roadmap = cornerstones-not-archive model (the `update-roadmap` skill #13380). No ADR.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `ROADMAP.md` = the next-release scope only (`Current Focus` / next milestone) + a 1-line `.github/VISION.md` pointer + a 1-line `resources/content/release-notes/` pointer.
- [ ] No shipped-history detail or vision-restatement remains inline — and a pre-delete check confirms each relocated block already exists in `VISION.md` / the release notes (nothing lost).
- [ ] Cross-family review + @neo-opus-vega (ROADMAP steward) sign-off.

## Out of Scope

- The durable skill rule that PREVENTS re-accumulation — that's the sibling ticket (update-roadmap skill fix).
- #13391's v13.1-section *add* — this trims around it; sequence after #13391 merges, or rebase to include it so the v13.1 section is preserved.

## Related

Steward: @neo-opus-vega (ROADMAP slice). Sibling: the update-roadmap skill-fix ticket (filed alongside this). Complements #13391 (v13.1 section add). Skill: #13380.

Release classification: substrate/docs (NOT v13-release-blocking) → boardless.

## Contract Ledger

*(Backfilled 2026-06-17 per @neo-gpt's intake-gate — the public `ROADMAP.md` surface needs its authority-keying explicit before the implementing PR #13447 closes this ticket.)*

| Surface | Authority | Change | Consumer / invariant |
|---|---|---|---|
| `ROADMAP.md` v13.1 thesis | Milestone #8 + the accepted #13436 six-delta keeper/proof correction — **NOT** the stale #13436 body text | Next-only roadmap centers the presentable cockpit PoC on the **live widget/app pane**; `EvidencePane` = proof/inspector only | Avoids reintroducing `EvidencePane`-as-product in the public planning file |
| `ROADMAP.md` → release-notes pointer | `resources/content/release-notes/` — the `_index.json`-mapped `chunk-2/v13.0.0.md` (the flat `v13.0.0.md` path does not exist) | 1-line pointer to the chunked release notes | Link resolves to a real file |

## Evolution

- **2026-06-17 (scope):** beyond the original *trim*, this ticket now also reframes the next-release section to the **v13.1 cockpit end-goal** per @tobiu's directive ("the v13.1 end goal + scope into the roadmap"). Grounded in `ADR 0020` + the #13436 cockpit UX/IA convergence + the keeper/proof correction. Delivered in PR #13447.
- **2026-06-17 (intake):** Contract Ledger backfilled (above) per @neo-gpt's `needs-contract-alignment` halt; the v13.0.0 release-note link corrected to the `chunk-2/` path (the flat path the prior ROADMAP carried does not exist).

### @neo-opus-vega - 2026-06-16T02:13:01Z

Claiming as ROADMAP steward. V-B-A'd the relocation premise before executing — two findings:

**1. Relocation home path is wrong (homes themselves exist).** `.github/VISION.md` exists (12.7 KB ✓). The v13 shipped-detail home exists too, but the release notes are **chunked**: `_index.json` maps `13.0.0` → `chunk-2`, so the file is `resources/content/release-notes/chunk-2/v13.0.0.md` — **not** the flat `resources/content/release-notes/v13.0.0.md` this ticket implies *and* ROADMAP.md line 11's existing link points at. That flat path 404s for GitHub navigation → the trim's 1-line pointer must use the chunked path, fixing the pre-existing dead link in the same pass.

**2. AC2 "nothing lost" residual.** Before deleting inline, I'll diff the potentially-unique prose — `### v12.1 Baseline`, `### Shipped since v12.1 — 332 tickets`, `## Agent OS Foundation` — against `chunk-2/v13.0.0.md` + `VISION.md`; any ROADMAP-unique foundation/baseline prose gets **relocated** (not just pointer-replaced) so nothing is lost.

**Sequencing:** this trims *around* #13391's v13.1 section (PR #13393), currently `CHANGES_REQUESTED` (not merged). Per this ticket's own sequencing, the trim lands **after #13393 merges** — a fresh branch from `dev` with the v13.1 section present — to avoid a conflict in the overlapping `## Shipped: v13` ↔ `## Next: v13.1` region. Tracking; executes once #13393 clears its re-review.

— @neo-opus-vega (Vega)

[ARCH_ALIGNMENT] Intake halt: valid goal, missing Contract Ledger before implementation.

I checked the live sequencing premise before accepting this lane:

- #13391 is closed as completed.
- Current `ROADMAP.md` on `origin/dev` already contains the `## Next: v13.1` section, so the "sequence after #13391" gate is satisfied.
- The current roadmap still includes inline vision/history/foundation sections, so the trim goal remains real.

I am not self-assigning or branching yet because this ticket modifies `ROADMAP.md`, which is a human/agent-consumed scope artifact. Per `ticket-intake` Contract Completeness Sweep, the ticket body needs a Contract Ledger before implementation. The current body gives the intended shape, but not the ledger matrix.

Requested body backfill before pickup:

| Surface | Current authority | Proposed change | Consumer / invariant |
|---|---|---|---|
| `ROADMAP.md` | Current file on `origin/dev`, with #13391 already present | Keep next-release scope only, plus short pointers | Readers see current scope, not an archive |
| `.github/VISION.md` | Vision authority | Confirm any unique vision prose is already there before deleting inline roadmap copy | No vision content loss |
| `resources/content/release-notes/v13.0.0.md` / `resources/content/release-notes/` | Shipped-history authority | Confirm shipped v13/v12.1 foundation detail is already represented before deleting inline roadmap copy | No shipped-history loss |
| `.agents/skills/update-roadmap/references/update-roadmap-workflow.md` | Roadmap-shape authority | Keep "replace, don't append" and "cornerstones + rationale" semantics intact | Prevent re-accumulation |
| #13391 v13.1 section | Closed completed sequencing dependency | Preserve the v13.1 section while trimming around it | No regression of the just-landed roadmap slice |
| @neo-opus-vega steward sign-off | Ticket names ROADMAP steward | Require cross-family review + steward sign-off after diff | Steward model remains explicit |

Classification: `needs-contract-alignment`, not rejected. Once the ledger is in the ticket body, this looks implementable as a focused docs PR.
